about.bio_p1: BORN IN 1979 IN KARS DUE TO MY FATHER'S MILITARY DUTY. AFTER COMPLETING MY PRIMARY AND SECONDARY EDUCATION IN ISTANBUL, I GRADUATED FROM IZMIR MALTEPE MILITARY HIGH SCHOOL AND LATER FROM THE MILITARY ACADEMY IN 2002.
about.bio_p2: BETWEEN 2009-2011, I COMPLETED MY MASTER'S DEGREE IN MANAGEMENT AND ORGANIZATION AT SELCUK UNIVERSITY IN KONYA. IN 2014, I OBTAINED THE CLASS A OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY EXPERT CERTIFICATE ISSUED BY THE MINISTRY OF LABOR AND SOCIAL SECURITY.
about.bio_p3: BETWEEN 2002-2023, I SERVED IN VARIOUS UNITS AND HEADQUARTERS OF THE TURKISH ARMED FORCES AS PLATOON AND COMPANY COMMANDER, GARRISON COMMANDER, PERSONNEL PLANNING OFFICER, AND PERSONNEL BRANCH MANAGER. UPON RETIRING IN 2023, I DECIDED TO TRANSFER THE KNOWLEDGE AND DISCIPLINE I ACQUIRED TO THE REAL ESTATE SECTOR.
about.bio_p4: AS OF OCTOBER 2024, TOGETHER WITH MY OFFICE IN ISTANBUL, I WILL CONTINUE TO MANAGE YOUR REAL ESTATE SALES AND RENTAL PROCESSES PROFESSIONALLY, WITHOUT COMPROMISING ON A RELIABLE, TRANSPARENT, AND CORPORATE APPROACH.

reviews.content: As a real estate agent, he exceeded our expectations and quickly found a reliable tenant. He was professional, transparent, and solution-oriented at every stage. He effortlessly managed everything for us. I highly recommend him with peace of mind.
reviews.author: Vedat Yılmaz

reviews.content: I received highly professional service. Throughout the entire process, there was continuous information flow. Minor setbacks were resolved with great patience and support. It was an exceptionally valuable and high-quality experience.
reviews.author: Erkan Varol

reviews.content: A highly reliable person who does his job with great meticulousness. My wife and I are deeply grateful for the detached house we purchased through him. Thank you for your constructive approach to all our requests.
reviews.author: Uğur Araşlıklar

questions.q: How long does it take to sell/rent my property?
questions.a: Although it varies depending on the location of your property, pricing strategy, and market conditions, with the right pricing and a professional marketing network, we conclude our portfolios within 15 to 30 days on average.

questions.q: How is the real estate valuation done?
questions.a: The realistic and correct price with market equivalent is determined by comprehensively analyzing the comparable properties in the region, current market dynamics, the physical condition of your property, and its goodwill.

questions.q: What is your service fee (commission rate)?
questions.a: Our service fees are determined transparently within the framework of legal standards depending on whether the real estate is for sale or for rent. You can contact us for detailed information.

questions.q: Do you follow up on all legal processes?
questions.a: Yes, from the deposit contract to the title deed transfer or the signing of the lease agreement, all legal, financial, and bureaucratic processes are followed up strictly by our team and concluded smoothly.

footer.brand_desc: With our experience in the real estate sector, professional approach, and the RE/MAX network, we offer the most accurate value and fastest solutions for your investments.

items.title: Signs of Recovery in 2024 Housing Sales
items.excerpt: Total housing sales across Turkey have increased, approaching the 1.5 million mark. Despite high interest rates, the market is showing resilience and steady demand.

items.title: Return on Real Estate Investment Drops to 14 Years
items.excerpt: Thanks to rising rental yields and regional price adjustments, the average amortization period for real estate investments has dropped, making it highly attractive to investors.

items.title: New Legal Regulations in the Rental Market
items.excerpt: Legal regulations regarding the rental process continue to impact the market. New period practices are now strictly enforced in negotiations between landlords and tenants.
